query:
UPDATE blender_installation_location 
            SET 
            is_default = ?,
            full_control = ?,
            modify = ?,
            read_and_execute = ?,
            list_folder_contents = ?,
            read = ?,
            write = ?,
            special_permissions = ?,
            directory_path = ?,
            created_by = ?,
            modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            WHERE id = ?
